metadata.name: Synchronize Content Between Systems
metadata.description: Synchronize the content of a local directory with a copy on a remote server
objectives: Synchronize the contents of a local directory with a copy on a remote server
Use rsync to efficiently transfer only changed files
prerequisites: Access to servera and serverb machines
Root access on servera to read /var/log

hosts.name: servera
hosts.description: Source server with log files to sync

tasks.name: Verify serverlogs directory exists on serverb
tasks.description: The ~/serverlogs directory should exist on serverb to receive synced logs
tasks.failure_message: serverlogs directory does not exist on serverb
hints: On serverb, create the directory: mkdir ~/serverlogs

tasks.name: Verify log directory is synced to serverb
tasks.description: The /var/log directory from servera should be synced to serverlogs/log on serverb
tasks.failure_message: log directory not found in serverlogs
hints: From servera as root: rsync -av /var/log student@serverb:/home/student/serverlogs

tasks.name: Verify messages log file is synced
tasks.description: The messages log file should exist in the synced directory
tasks.failure_message: messages log file not found in synced directory
hints: Run rsync from servera: sudo rsync -av /var/log student@serverb:/home/student/serverlogs

tasks.name: Verify secure log file is synced
tasks.description: The secure log file should exist in the synced directory
tasks.failure_message: secure log file not found in synced directory
hints: Run rsync from servera: sudo rsync -av /var/log student@serverb:/home/student/serverlogs

tasks.name: Verify synchronization message in messages log
tasks.description: The synced messages log should contain the 'Log files synchronized' entry
tasks.success_message: Synchronization message found in synced messages log
tasks.failure_message: Synchronization message not found - may need to re-sync after logging
hints: On servera as root: logger 'Log files synchronized'

tasks.name: Verify audit subdirectory is synced
tasks.description: The audit subdirectory should be synced with log files
tasks.failure_message: audit directory not found in synced logs
hints: Run rsync from servera: sudo rsync -av /var/log student@serverb:/home/student/serverlogs
